description.ko: 반투명한 막을 통해 생체 발광 빛을 내뿜는 유기적 호흡 생명체의 형상화.
description.en: A representation of organic respiratory life breathing bioluminescent light through translucent membranes.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Celestial Valve Flow.' A gargantuan, translucent organic pump structure composed of #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular networks. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent mist. Rhythmic pulses exhale thick, viscous ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that flow like liquid silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro focus on the internal capillary systems and glowing sap channels. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
